name: Stem Browser
description: Producer stem and sample browser with waveform previews, BPM/key facets, tags, usage status, drag-ready assets, and version metadata.

library.description: Full stem library browser with facets and dense waveform rows

compact.description: Compact crate list for sidebars and session inspectors

visual_brief: A dense production asset browser attached to the DAW, not a generic data table. Top search combines BPM, key, type, mood, owner, and usage filters. Rows show stem name, waveform mini-preview, duration, BPM/key, tags, owner, status, version count, and drag/add affordance. Active or used stems have clear badges. Use compact alignment, scroll-area behavior, and stable row height so producers can scan like a sample crate.

slots.filters: Search input and facets for type, BPM, key, mood, collaborator, and usage state.
slots.stem-row: Dense row with waveform mini-preview, metadata, tags, and action buttons.
slots.drop-affordance: Clear drag or add-to-session target state for each asset.

micro.preview-hover: waveform mini animates playhead sweep while hovered

responsive.mobile: Facets collapse into horizontal chips, rows stack metadata below the waveform, and drag affordance becomes an add button. Keep waveform mini-previews wide enough to remain useful.
responsive.desktop: Use dense rows with facets visible and waveform mini-previews aligned for scanning.

keyboard: A: add selected stem to session

layout_hints.scan_density: Rows should support fast scanning across BPM, key, usage, and waveform shape.
layout_hints.audio_identity: Every row needs an audio-specific visual signal, preferably a mini waveform.
